# kCFStreamPropertyFTPAttemptPersistentConnection | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CFNetwork ](/documentation/cfnetwork)

- [ kCFStreamPropertyFTPAttemptPersistentConnection ](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfstreampropertyftpattemptpersistentconnection)

-  kCFStreamPropertyFTPAttemptPersistentConnection 

Global Variable# kCFStreamPropertyFTPAttemptPersistentConnection

iOS 2.0–9.0DeprecatediPadOS 2.0–9.0DeprecatedMac Catalyst 13.1–13.1DeprecatedmacOS 10.3–10.11DeprecatedtvOS 9.0–9.0DeprecatedvisionOS 1.0–1.0Deprecated

```
let kCFStreamPropertyFTPAttemptPersistentConnection: CFString
```

Deprecated

Use NSURLSessionAPI for ftp requests

## [Discussion](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfstreampropertyftpattemptpersistentconnection#Discussion)

FTP Attempt Persistent Connection stream property key for set and copy operations. Set this property to `kCFBooleanTrue` to enable the reuse of existing server connections; set this property to `kCFBooleanFalse` to not reuse existing server connections. By default, this property is set to `kCFBooleanTrue`.
